title: Brussels Bites Paleo
description: A smoky and crisp take on the classic Brussels sprouts dish with a twist of Spanish flavor, perfectly suited for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: for brushing on the Brussels sprouts while roasting

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the quartered Brussels sprouts with olive oil. Drizzle in additional oil if needed.
Add minced garlic, smoked paprika, lemon juice, sea salt, and black pepper into the bowl and toss everything together evenly.
Spread the Brussels sprout mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper to catch any excess oil.
Roast for 20-25 minutes or until they are golden brown and crispy. Rotate the pan halfway through if you wish for even browning.
Garnish with finely chopped cilantro just before serving for added freshness.
